title: Everyday plans - Future forms
texts:
Complete the sentences with the correct future form.

Options: will / be going to / present continuous

1. I ______ meet Alex at 6 p.m. We arranged it yesterday.
2. Look at those clouds. It ______ rain.
3. A: The phone is ringing.
   B: I ______ answer it.
questions: Write the three missing forms in order.
